issue.title: www.verizon.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://www.verizon.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.verizon.com%2F) ### Comment > I am trying to activate Verizon Wi-Fi Calling in my iPhone 16 PRO Max, but I am receiving the attached error page message. I turned on/off wifi, disabled Adguard and still the same issue!? Should I uninstall Adguard? > I have no VPN software or profile. > > My wife has the same phone and provider ND her wifi calling activate and working fine but she doesn't have Adguard App. > > Thank You! > Izzy > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/qbbv16fvv688scwwgko4kg84gocsgo0seix90awueo.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/js54yoci5lwwoccgogwksoc0s0ogsospurdheezslw.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.20 License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter DNS filtering: | disabled Other extensions used: | `none`

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.title: www.verizon.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://www.verizon.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.verizon.com%2F) ### Comment > I am trying to activate Verizon Wi-Fi Calling in my iPhone 16 PRO Max, but I am receiving the attached error page message. I turned on/off wifi, disabled Adguard and still the same issue!? Should I uninstall Adguard? > I have no VPN software or profile. > > My wife has the same phone and provider ND her wifi calling activate and working fine but she doesn't have Adguard App. > > Thank You! > Izzy > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/qbbv16fvv688scwwgko4kg84gocsgo0seix90awueo.jpg?nc=1)

AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter DNS filtering: | disabled Other extensions used: | `none`
